checks.name: visual_story_is_packaged_and_truthfully_bounded
checks.run:
from pathlib import Path
import hashlib,json,struct
root=Path.cwd(); asset_root=root/'docs'/'assets'/'how-it-works'; manifest=json.loads((asset_root/'manifest.json').read_text(encoding='utf-8')); entries=manifest['illustrations']; assert len(entries)==9; assert [e['order'] for e in entries]==list(range(1,10))
for entry in entries:
 data=(asset_root/entry['filename']).read_bytes(); assert hashlib.sha256(data).hexdigest()==entry['sha256']; assert data[:8]==b'\x89PNG\r\n\x1a\n'; assert struct.unpack('>II',data[16:24])==(1122,1402)
readme=(root/'README.md').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert readme.count('Concept illustrations')==1; assert readme.count('Exact shipped UI')==1; assert readme.count('https://raw.githubusercontent.com/zrk222/code-factory/main/docs/assets/how-it-works/')==3
public='\n'.join((root/p).read_text(encoding='utf-8') for p in ['README.md','LAUNCH_KIT.md','PUBLICATION_GUIDE.md','docs/HOW_IT_WORKS_VISUAL.md','docs/PRODUCT_HUNT_GALLERY.md','.zenodo.json']); assert all(term not in public for term in ['2.6 hrs','$14.37','82%','github.com/code-factory']); assert 'docs/assets/how-it-works/*.png' in (root/'.github'/'workflows'/'publish.yml').read_text(encoding='utf-8'); assert '*.json' in (root/'MANIFEST.in').read_text(encoding='utf-8')
